summary: Create A Manual Forecast Line Item
description: Create a manual forecast line item for a budget line item

budget_line_item_id.description: Id of the associated Budget Line Item

wbs_code_id.description: Wbs code id of the associated Budget Line Item

budget_forecast_id.description: Id of the associated parent budget forecast

created_at.description: Date-time the manual forecast line item was created

updated_at.description: Date-time the manual forecast line item was last updated

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code configured for the financial entity

budget_line_item_id.description: Identifier of the parent budget line item. NOTE - budget line item id or wbs code id is required

wbs_code_id.description: Wbs code id of the parent budget line item. NOTE - budget line item id or wbs code id is required
